tasks.title: Setup Supabase Environment Variables
tasks.description: Configure the necessary environment variables for Supabase connection in the Next.js application.
tasks.details:
Create or update the .env.local file to include SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_KEY variables. Ensure these variables are properly loaded in the Next.js environment. For production, configure these variables in the hosting platform's environment settings. Example:

```
SUPABASE_URL=https://your-project-id.supabase.co
SUPABASE_KEY=your-supabase-service-role-key
```

Make sure to add .env.local to .gitignore to prevent exposing sensitive credentials.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify that environment variables are correctly loaded by creating a simple test endpoint that confirms connection to Supabase without exposing credentials. Use Next.js built-in environment variable validation to ensure required variables are present.

tasks.title: Create Supabase Pipeline Deals Table
tasks.description: Design and create the 'pipeline_deals' table in Supabase with appropriate columns and constraints.
tasks.details:
Using Supabase dashboard or SQL editor, create the 'pipeline_deals' table with the following structure:

```sql
CREATE TABLE pipeline_deals (
  id UUID PRIMARY KEY DEFAULT uuid_generate_v4(),
  title TEXT NOT NULL,
  value DECIMAL(10,2),
  status TEXT,
  company TEXT,
  contact_name TEXT,
  contact_email TEXT,
  notes TEXT,
  stage TEXT,
  created_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW(),
  updated_at TIMESTAMP WITH TIME ZONE DEFAULT NOW()
);

-- Create a trigger to update the updated_at column
CREATE TRIGGER update_pipeline_deals_updated_at
BEFORE UPDATE ON pipeline_deals
FOR EACH ROW
EXECUTE PROCEDURE update_updated_at_column();
```

Adjust fields as needed based on specific CRM requirements.
tasks.testStrategy: Verify table creation by connecting to Supabase and running a SELECT query. Test the automatic timestamp functionality by inserting and updating records. Ensure the UUID generation works correctly for new records.

tasks.title: Implement GET Endpoint for Pipeline Deals
tasks.description: Create the GET endpoint to retrieve all pipeline deals sorted by creation date in descending order.
tasks.testStrategy: Test the endpoint using tools like Postman or Thunder Client. Verify that it returns the correct data structure and status codes. Create test cases for both successful responses and error handling. Implement integration tests using Jest and Supertest to validate the endpoint behavior.

tasks.title: Implement POST Endpoint for Pipeline Deals
tasks.description: Create the POST endpoint to add new deals to the pipeline.
tasks.testStrategy: Test the endpoint with various valid and invalid payloads. Verify proper error handling for malformed requests. Check that the endpoint returns the newly created deal with a 201 status code. Implement integration tests that validate the data is correctly stored in the database.

tasks.title: Implement PUT Endpoint for Pipeline Deals
tasks.description: Create the PUT endpoint to update existing deals in the pipeline.
tasks.testStrategy: Test the endpoint with various update scenarios including valid and invalid IDs. Verify that only the specified fields are updated. Check error handling for non-existent records. Implement integration tests that validate the data is correctly updated in the database.

tasks.title: Implement DELETE Endpoint for Pipeline Deals
tasks.description: Create a DELETE endpoint to remove deals from the pipeline.
tasks.testStrategy: Test the endpoint with valid and invalid IDs. Verify proper error handling for non-existent records. Check that the endpoint returns appropriate status codes. Implement integration tests that confirm the record is actually removed from the database.

tasks.title: Implement Input Validation
tasks.description: Add validation for all API endpoints to ensure data integrity and security.
tasks.testStrategy: Create comprehensive test cases for validation rules. Test with valid data, invalid data, edge cases, and malicious inputs. Verify that appropriate error messages are returned for each validation failure. Test that valid data passes through without issues.

tasks.title: Implement Error Handling and Logging
tasks.description: Enhance error handling and add logging for all API endpoints.
tasks.testStrategy: Test error handling with various error scenarios including database errors, validation errors, and unexpected exceptions. Verify that appropriate status codes and error messages are returned. Check that sensitive information is not leaked in error responses. Verify that errors are properly logged.
